title: Bundle of Triplewax Liquid Gold 500ml Car Wash Shampoo + Triplewax Wheel Cleaner 500ml + 3-in-1 Microfibre Wash Mitt Complete Car Cleaning Kit
features: COMPLETE CAR CLEANING BUNDLE: Includes Triplewax Liquid Gold Self-Drying Car Shampoo, Wheel Cleaner, and 3-in-1 Microfibre Wash Mitt for a full vehicle cleaning solution.
EFFORTLESS WHEEL CLEANING: Triplewax Wheel Cleaner swiftly removes baked-on brake dust, dirt, and grime, making wheel maintenance fast and easy.
POWERFUL CLEANING FORMULA: Both shampoo and wheel cleaner cut through stubborn dirt and grime, leaving paintwork and wheels spotless, streak-free, and sparkling.
MULTI-PURPOSE WASH MITT: Soft, absorbent, and versatile, the 3-in-1 microfibre mitt traps dust effectively and can be used instead of a sponge for safe, scratch-free cleaning.
QUICK, EASY & EFFECTIVE: Self-drying car shampoo reduces drying time, while the bundle ensures outstanding results with minimal effort, giving your car a professional-quality finish.
description: Achieve a professional-quality clean with the Triplewax Complete Car Cleaning Bundle, featuring Liquid Gold Self-Drying Car Shampoo 500ml, Wheel Cleaner 500ml, and a 3-in-1 Microfibre Wash Mitt. This all-in-one kit delivers everything you need to clean, shine, and protect your vehicle with ease.
